context: Evaluates whether the agent creates a platform-agnostic chess engine logic with a clear FFI-compatible bridge for multi-platform use (WASM/Mobile).

checklist.name: Platform-agnostic Core
checklist.description: The chess engine code contains no UI framework imports or environment-specific globals (e.g. no React, no window)

checklist.name: Explicit Bridge Interface
checklist.description: Defines an explicit bridge, FFI layer, or contract for connecting Core to View

checklist.name: Strongly typed commands
checklist.description: User intent (making a move) is captured as a typed command (e.g. MakeMove { from: 'e2', to: 'e4' }) passed to the Core

checklist.name: Read-only ViewModel
checklist.description: The board state is passed to the UI via a read-only ViewModel/DTO (e.g. BoardState)

checklist.name: Humble View
checklist.description: The UI component only renders the board from the ViewModel and performs no game logic check (e.g. valid moves)

checklist.name: Game logic in Core
checklist.description: Game rules (move validation, checkmate detection) are implemented in the Core layer
